title: Verify login succeeds with leading/trailing spaces in email
description: Test that the system trims leading or trailing whitespace from the email field before authentication.
preconditions: User account exists with email 'test@example.com' and password 'validPassword123'
User is on the login page

steps.description: 1. Enter '  test@example.com  ' into the email field

expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application's home/dashboard screen.
